info.name: SpeedClaim — Full Demo (110 Endpoints)
info.description:
All 110 endpoints in 11 story-based folders.
Token auto-injected via collection pre-request script.
🔑 = role switch (Login reuse, not a new endpoint)
⚠️ = file upload or Stripe — run manually during demo

All passwords: Password@123
Seeded accounts:
  Admin           davish2204@gmail.com
  Agent           davishthedelicious@gmail.com
  Underwriter     underwriter@speedclaim.com
  ClaimsOfficer   claimsofficer@speedclaim.com
  FinanceOfficer  financeofficer@speedclaim.com
  Surveyor        surveyor@speedclaim.com
  Customer 1      davish.cs22@bitsathy.ac.in   (Rahul, Health+Motor policies)
  Customer 2      davishoffl@gmail.com          (Priya, Life policy)

request.description: Registers a new customer. Sends verification email to newcustomer@demo.com. Use the token from that email in the next request.
Paste the token from the verification email sent to newcustomer@demo.com
Sends a password reset email. Use the token from that email in Reset Password.

request.description: Admin creates an agent account directly (no email verification required). Admin token required.
Admin force-resets any user's password. targetUserId = Customer 2 (Priya).
⚠️ Select a PDF/JPG file for frontDocument. File must be ≤ 5 MB. idNumber must be 12 digits for Aadhaar.
Customer sees masked Aadhaar (last 4 digits visible). Admin sees full decrypted value.
customerUserId = Customer 1 (Rahul). isApproved=false + reason for rejection.

request.description: Captures newProposalId for use in subsequent requests.
⚠️ Select a PDF file. Document key examples: INCOME_PROOF, AADHAAR, MEDICAL_REPORT, PAN
Proposal 4 (Arjun's) is in UnderReview status — ideal for underwriter workflow demo.
Approving this creates a policy automatically. Use isApproved: false + notes for rejection.
Returns a generated text-based policy document. Save response as a file.
⚠️ Destructive — cancels Priya's Life policy. Uses hardcoded policy 3 to preserve main policyId for other demos.
Returns Stripe-saved payment methods for this customer.
⚠️ Requires a real Stripe PaymentMethod. Use Stripe test card pm_card_visa during live demo.
Marks a payment as manually reconciled (for offline payments, corrections).
⚠️ Requires paymentId to have a valid Stripe PaymentIntent. Will fail on seeded payments (no Stripe intent).
Issues a Stripe payout to the customer's saved payment method for the approved claim amount.
Marks claim as financially settled (no Stripe payout — for cash/bank transfer settlements).

header.description: Must be a valid Stripe webhook signature

request.description: This endpoint is invoked by Stripe (via `stripe listen --forward-to localhost:5062/api/v1/payments/webhook`), NOT by manual Postman clicks. It verifies the Stripe-Signature header, so an unsigned Postman request is correctly rejected with 400. The test below asserts that rejection (signature verification working as intended).

exec: // Webhook requires a valid Stripe-Signature header. An unsigned Postman request
// is expected to be rejected with 400 — this proves signature verification works.
pm.test('Webhook rejects unsigned payload (signature verification)', function () {

body.raw:
{
  "policyId": "90000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",

}

request.description: Creates a new Health cashless claim. ID is captured as activeClaimId for the workflow below.
⚠️ Select a PDF/image file. Document key examples: HOSPITAL_BILL, DISCHARGE_SUMMARY, PRESCRIPTION, POLICE_REPORT, REPAIR_ESTIMATE
Claims Officer takes ownership of the claim. Officer ID taken from JWT token.

body.raw: "Please submit discharge summary, treating doctor's certificate, and original hospital bills within 5 working days."

request.description: Uses seeded Motor claim (CLM-2024-0002) — surveyorId points to seeded Deepak Rao.

formdata.value: Rear bumper and boot completely damaged. Estimated repair cost ₹85,000. Vehicle driveable. Recommend approved repair at authorised workshop.

request.description: ⚠️ Select a PDF file for reportDocument. Uses seeded Motor claim (CLM-2024-0002).
Approves cashless pre-authorisation for the Health claim. Claim must be cashless and in PreAuthRequested status.
Final step — marks claim as settled. Finance Officer then processes payout.
Assigned to Claims Officer (Meera Iyer).
targetUserId = Customer 2 (Priya). Body is a raw JSON string: 'Customer', 'Agent', 'Underwriter', etc.
Use isActive=true to reactivate. Deactivated users cannot log in.
